name: wily-roadmap
description: Project + flat goal-sized Task manager for Wily Roadmap v3.

interface.shortDescription: Manage v3 project task lists and local agent workflow state.
interface.longDescription: Wily Roadmap v3 manages a Project plus a flat list of goal-sized Tasks. It is local-first, approval-first for remote actions, emits custom-workflow goal text without calling external runners, and preserves Codex plugin discovery compatibility.
defaultPrompt: $wily-init: start or adopt a v3 project
parent-owned coordination: .wily/coordination.yaml takes precedence over wily-workspace.yaml and exposes active_mode
coordination claim_snapshot tracks child branch, sha, dirty files, and fingerprints
coordination land --dry-run checks mixed files; local-only land rejects push
$wily-agent: login, install, and check the bundled Board sync daemon
